label: 2026-04-17-no-control
description: Strongest obvious no-Frost April 17 exploit line: mirror the canonical clear, but replace Frost Fern with a forward Thorn Vine at (r2, c5). That keeps the same early bank, side-lane coverage, late lane-4 stack, and center Bramble follow-up while brute-forcing lane 2 with pure damage. The retuned board should now FAIL at the late triple-ram lane-2 window because Frost Fern's slow is required, not just an extra front attacker.

placements.note: Open with a center Thorn so the first lane-2 beetles are already under fire.
Early bank away from the center sniper lane so the first pulses arrive before wave 2.
Catch the first lane-1 Shard Mite before it slips past the wall column.
Mirror the lane-1 answer for the lane-3 Shard Mite.
This is the stronger exploit line: spend the Frost Fern slot on a forward Thorn at the same c5 tile and try to tank lane 2 with raw damage instead of chill.
Backfill the top lane before the late wave-1 Shard Mite can cross the wall tile.
Screen the lane-4 Sunroot before the wave-2 sniper can take it.
Third lane-2 damage body arrives behind the front Thorn, but the retuned board should still break at the late triple-ram window without Frost Fern's slow.
Top-lane reinforce for the late glass-ram window.
Late center Bramble follow-up. On the retuned board, a pure damage line should never get this far safely.
